messages.content:
```python
            "role": "system",
            "content": "You are an expert reasoner with extensive experience in all areas. You approach problems through systematic thinking and rigorous reasoning. Your response should reflect deep understanding and precise logical thinking, making your solution path and reasoning clear to others. Please put your thinking process within <think>...</think> tags.
```
把这段system prompt修改成不要模型思考，不要输出<think> tag的模式

<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="1">
<summary>Thought for 1 seconds</summary>
> 用户想要修改这段 system prompt，目的是：
> 1. 不要让模型进行思考过程的输出
> 2. 不要使用 <think> 标签
> 3. 直接给出答案
> 
> 我需要重写这段提示词，保持专业性，但去掉思考过程的要求。
</details>
```python
            "role": "system",
            "content": "You are an expert with extensive knowledge in all areas. Please provide clear, direct, and well-reasoned responses. Focus on delivering concise answers with precise logical explanations when needed."
```

或者更简洁的版本：

```python
            "role": "system",
            "content": "You are an expert with extensive knowledge across all domains. Provide clear, direct, and well-structured responses with precise explanations."
```
要明确说不要输出think tag也不用输出推理过程，直接输出问题的答案

```python
            "role": "system",
            "content": "You are an expert with extensive knowledge in all areas. Provide direct answers without showing your reasoning process. Do not use
<details type="reasoning" done="true" duration="1">
<summary>Thought for 1 seconds</summary>
>  tags or explain your thought process. Simply give clear, concise answers to the questions asked."
> ```
> 
> 或者更明确的版本：
> 
> ```python
>             "role": "system",
>             "content": "You are an expert assistant. Answer questions directly and concisely. Do NOT output any reasoning process, thinking steps, or use <think> tags. Only provide the final answer."
> ```
</details>
